items.question: What is GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)?
items.answer: GEO is the practice of optimizing web content so that AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini cite or recommend it when generating answers. While traditional SEO aims for top rankings in search results, GEO focuses on making AI systems trust and select your content as a reliable source.

items.question: What is the difference between SEO and GEO?
items.answer: SEO targets traditional search engines like Google and Naver for higher rankings on search result pages. GEO optimizes content for AI-generated answers and citations. SEO focuses on keywords and backlinks, while GEO emphasizes content authority, accuracy, and structured data. Both should be pursued together for maximum impact.

items.question: What is a marketing automation system?
items.answer: A marketing automation system uses tools like N8N, MAKE, and Zapier to automatically handle repetitive marketing tasks such as lead collection, CRM integration, email campaigns, and social media posting. It reduces manual work and improves efficiency so you can focus on business growth.

items.question: What kind of businesses need an AI marketing system?
items.answer: Businesses doing digital marketing but struggling with manual processes, businesses wanting to be discovered in AI search, and businesses looking to systematically run content marketing. It is applicable regardless of size, from startups to mid-sized companies.

items.question: What is the project process?
items.answer: 1) Free consultation to understand your business goals. 2) Custom strategy and system design proposal. 3) System build and optimization after approval. 4) Post-launch performance monitoring and continuous improvement.

items.question: How can I request a consultation?
items.answer: You can submit a request through the contact form at the bottom of the page, or send an email to info@funnelhacker.co.kr. Please briefly describe your project scope and goals, and we will respond promptly.
